title: ICAI CA May 2026 Exams: Registration Begins with New Exam Centre Selection Option!
content:
# ICAI CA May 2026 Exams: Registration Begins with New Exam Centre Selection Option!

Hello future CAs! Ek important update hai ICAI ki taraf se. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne May 2026 CA examinations ke liye online registration process start kar diya hai, aur iss baar ek significant change bhi introduce kiya gaya hai.

Here are the key details you need to know:

*   **Registration Start Date:** Online application forms for CA Foundation, Intermediate, and Final exams for May 2026 session have started from **March 3, 2026 (10:00 AM IST)**.
*   **New Exam Centre Selection Option:** Unlike previous examinations where students only selected a zone or city, the online application form for May 2026 CA examinations will now provide the option to select the **preferred exam centre in zone/city directly**.
*   **Official Announcement:** This important update regarding the examination centre selection was officially announced by ICAI on **March 2, 2026**.
*   **Last Date without Late Fee:** The deadline for online submission without a late fee is **March 16, 2026 (11:59 PM IST)**.
*   **Last Date with Late Fee:** With a late fee, you can apply until **March 19, 2026 (11:59 PM IST)**.
*   **Correction Window:** The application correction window will be available from **March 20 to March 22, 2026**.

This new option for selecting your preferred exam centre within the zone/city is definitely a helpful step for students. Make sure to complete your registration well within the deadlines to avoid any last-minute hassle.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=20562)

*Published on: 3 March 2026*
